title: Introduction to Frontend Testing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the basics of frontend software testing.

questions.question: What is the primary role of frontend testing in web application development?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
To test the client-side of a web app, including its user interface and performance

questions.question: Regarding the frontend testing, why is it beneficial to catch bugs that occur in the browser?
options: It ensures a smooth and bug-free user experience
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
